calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Christine Louie, Esq., appeared for plaintiff Artizen, Inc.
Rosanna Hayden, Owner and CFO of plaintiff Artizen, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on February 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed March 11, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Artizen, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Urigin Pharmaceuticals, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $45,465.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,112.31.
Attorney Fees - $9,000.00.
Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $64,987.46.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Continued To Dec-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
